channel.title: Code Quality on Jamie Craane personal blog
channel.description: Recent content in Code Quality on Jamie Craane personal blog

item.title: Bridging Human Intent and AI Code Generation with @AIGuideline
item.description: Introduction As AI-powered coding assistants become increasingly prevalent in software development, a new challenge emerges: how do we ensure that AI-generated code aligns with our project’s specific architectural patterns, design principles, and coding standards? Existing AI guidelines, for example junie/.guidelines exist for this purpose. However, they are often large and challenging to maintain. How do we keep the guidelines consistent with the codebase? Depending on the project, they can contain a lot of information.
